# `stack` (haskell ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Hand-written prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly has no native detector for this package manager — graph resolution falls back to [Syft](https://github.com/anchore/syft), which emits a flat package list (no transitive edges, no scope classification). For navigation, this page is grouped under the synthetic [Syft](../) ecosystem rather than under `haskell`.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `stack` |
| Ecosystem | `haskell` |
| Detector chain | `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `stack.yaml`, `stack.yaml.lock` |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `syft for bomly-lite` |
